text.div:
Generated Narrative: CodeSystem ASAClassification

Properties

This code system defines the following properties for its concepts

NameCodeURITypeDescription
commentcommenthttp://hl7.org/fhir/concept-properties#commentstringA string that provides additional detail pertinent to the use or understanding of the concept
effectiveDateeffectiveDatehttp://hl7.org/fhir/concept-properties#effectiveDatedateTimeThe date at which the concept status was last changed
statusstatushttp://hl7.org/fhir/concept-properties#statuscodeA code that indicates the status of the concept. Typical values are active, experimental, deprecated, and retired
Inactiveinactivehttp://hl7.org/fhir/concept-properties#inactivebooleanTrue if the concept is not considered active - e.g. not a valid concept any more. Property type is boolean, default value is false. Note that the status property may also be used to indicate that a concept is inactive

Concepts

This code system https://kip.rkkp.dk/fhir/CodeSystem/ASAClassification defines the following codes:

CodeDisplayDefinition
asai ASA IA normal healthy patient
asaii ASA IIA patient with mild systemic disease
asaiii ASA IIIA patient with severe systemic disease
asaiv ASA IVA patient with severe systemic disease that is a constant threat to life
asav ASA VA moribund patient who is not expected to survive without the operation
asavi ASA VIA declared brain-dead patient whose organs are being removed for donor purposes

name: ASAClassification
title: ASA Physical Status Classification System
publisher: Sundhedsvæsenets Kvalitetsinstitut with Trifork Digital Health A/S

description: Score udviklet til vurdering af det fysiske helbred. Link: https://www.asahq.org/standards-and-guidelines/asa-physical-status-classification-system

The date at which the concept status was last changed
A code that indicates the status of the concept. Typical values are active, experimental, deprecated, and retired

True if the concept is not considered active - e.g. not a valid concept any more. Property type is boolean, default value is false. Note that the status property may also be used to indicate that a concept is inactive

concept.definition: A patient with mild systemic disease
A patient with severe systemic disease
A patient with severe systemic disease that is a constant threat to life
